message:
fix(leak): cap EventBus fire_counts to prevent unbounded HashMap growth [ft-3kxe.1]

The fire_counts diagnostic HashMap tracked unique event names without
any size limit. Dynamically-generated event names could cause unbounded
growth. Added MAX_FIRE_COUNT_ENTRIES (4096) cap — new event names are
silently skipped once the limit is reached, while existing entries
continue to be counted normally.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
